sentences.hanzi: 中国的书法很有名。
sentences.pinyin: zhōngguó de shūfǎ hěn yǒumíng.
sentences.english: Chinese calligraphy is very famous.

sentences.hanzi: 这首诗是谁写的？
sentences.pinyin: zhè shǒu shī shì shéi xiě de?
sentences.english: Who wrote this poem?

sentences.hanzi: 他从小就喜欢画画。
sentences.pinyin: tā cóng xiǎo jiù xǐhuan huàhuà.
sentences.english: He's liked painting since he was young.

sentences.hanzi: 这个故事告诉我们一个道理。
sentences.pinyin: zhège gùshi gàosu wǒmen yīgè dàolǐ.
sentences.english: This story teaches us a lesson.

sentences.hanzi: 春节是中国最重要的节日。
sentences.pinyin: chūnjié shì zhōngguó zuì zhòngyào de jiérì.
sentences.english: Spring Festival is China's most important holiday.

sentences.hanzi: 我对中国哲学很感兴趣。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ duì zhōngguó zhéxué hěn gǎn xìngqù.
sentences.english: I'm very interested in Chinese philosophy.

sentences.hanzi: 音乐可以让人放松。
sentences.pinyin: yīnyuè kěyǐ ràng rén fàngsōng.
sentences.english: Music can help people relax.

sentences.hanzi: 这部电影讲的是什么？
sentences.pinyin: zhè bù diànyǐng jiǎng de shì shénme?
sentences.english: What is this movie about?

sentences.hanzi: 读书让人变得更聪明。
sentences.pinyin: dú shū ràng rén biàn de gèng cōngming.
sentences.english: Reading makes people smarter.

sentences.hanzi: 传统文化应该保护。
sentences.pinyin: chuántǒng wénhuà yīnggāi bǎohù.
sentences.english: Traditional culture should be protected.

sentences.hanzi: 茶文化在中国有很长的历史。
sentences.pinyin: chá wénhuà zài zhōngguó yǒu hěn cháng de lìshǐ.
sentences.english: Tea culture has a long history in China.

sentences.hanzi: 他写了一本关于旅行的书。
sentences.pinyin: tā xiě le yī běn guānyú lǚxíng de shū.
sentences.english: He wrote a book about traveling.

sentences.hanzi: 中秋节的时候吃月饼。
sentences.pinyin: zhōngqiūjié de shíhou chī yuèbǐng.
sentences.english: We eat mooncakes during the Mid-Autumn Festival.

sentences.hanzi: 我最近在学太极拳。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ zuìjìn zài xué tàijíquán.
sentences.english: I've been learning tai chi recently.

sentences.hanzi: 不同的文化有不同的习惯。
sentences.pinyin: bùtóng de wénhuà yǒu bùtóng de xíguàn.
sentences.english: Different cultures have different customs.

sentences.hanzi: 我喜欢看书。
sentences.pinyin: wǒ xǐhuan kàn shū.
sentences.english: I like reading books.

sentences.hanzi: 这本书很好看。
sentences.pinyin: zhè běn shū hěn hǎokàn.
sentences.english: This book is very good.

sentences.hanzi: 他喜欢写字。
sentences.pinyin: tā xǐhuan xiě zì.
sentences.english: He likes writing characters.

sentences.hanzi: 京剧被认为是中国的国粹之一。
sentences.pinyin: jīngjù bèi rènwéi shì zhōngguó de guócuì zhī yī.
sentences.english: Peking opera is considered one of China's national treasures.

sentences.hanzi: 这位作家的小说被翻译成了多种语言。
sentences.pinyin: zhè wèi zuòjiā de xiǎoshuō bèi fānyì chéng le duō zhǒng yǔyán.
sentences.english: This author's novels have been translated into many languages.

sentences.hanzi: 端午节赛龙舟的习俗已经有两千多年了。
sentences.pinyin: duānwǔjié sài lóngzhōu de xísú yǐjīng yǒu liǎng qiān duō nián le.
sentences.english: The custom of dragon boat racing during the Dragon Boat Festival is over two thousand years old.

sentences.hanzi: 这座寺庙的壁画描绘了古代的日常生活。
sentences.pinyin: zhè zuò sìmiào de bìhuà miáohuì le gǔdài de rìcháng shēnghuó.
sentences.english: The murals in this temple depict daily life in ancient times.

sentences.hanzi: 学习书法不仅练字，还能培养耐心和专注力。
sentences.pinyin: xuéxí shūfǎ bùjǐn liàn zì, hái néng péiyǎng nàixīn hé zhuānzhùlì.
sentences.english: Learning calligraphy is not just about practicing characters; it also cultivates patience and focus.

sentences.hanzi: 陶瓷艺术是中国对世界文明的重要贡献。
sentences.pinyin: táocí yìshù shì zhōngguó duì shìjiè wénmíng de zhòngyào gòngxiàn.
sentences.english: Ceramic art is an important Chinese contribution to world civilization.

sentences.hanzi: 中国的剪纸艺术被列入了非物质文化遗产名录。
sentences.pinyin: zhōngguó de jiǎnzhǐ yìshù bèi lièrù le fēi wùzhì wénhuà yíchǎn mínglù.
sentences.english: Chinese paper-cutting art has been listed as an intangible cultural heritage.

sentences.hanzi: 随着全球化的发展，跨文化交流变得越来越频繁。
sentences.pinyin: suízhe quánqiúhuà de fāzhǎn, kuà wénhuà jiāoliú biàn de yuèláiyuè pínfán.
sentences.english: With the development of globalization, cross-cultural exchanges have become more and more frequent.

sentences.hanzi: 古典文学作品反映了当时社会的价值观和审美观。
sentences.pinyin: gǔdiǎn wénxué zuòpǐn fǎnyìng le dāngshí shèhuì de jiàzhíguān hé shěnměiguān.
sentences.english: Classical literary works reflect the values and aesthetics of the society at the time.

sentences.hanzi: 非物质文化遗产的保护需要在传承与创新之间找到平衡。
sentences.pinyin: fēi wùzhì wénhuà yíchǎn de bǎohù xūyào zài chuánchéng yǔ chuàngxīn zhījiān zhǎodào pínghéng.
sentences.english: The protection of intangible cultural heritage requires finding a balance between inheritance and innovation.

sentences.hanzi: 民族音乐的现代改编让年轻人重新关注传统乐器。
sentences.pinyin: mínzú yīnyuè de xiàndài gǎibiān ràng niánqīngrén chóngxīn guānzhù chuántǒng yuèqì.
sentences.english: Modern adaptations of folk music have drawn young people's attention back to traditional instruments.

sentences.hanzi: 纪录片的兴起为传统手工艺的传播开辟了新的渠道。
sentences.pinyin: jìlùpiàn de xīngqǐ wèi chuántǒng shǒugōngyì de chuánbō kāipì le xīn de qúdào.
sentences.english: The rise of documentaries has opened new channels for the dissemination of traditional craftsmanship.

sentences.hanzi: 儒家思想对东亚社会的伦理观念和行为规范产生了深远的影响。
sentences.pinyin: rújiā sīxiǎng duì dōngyà shèhuì de lúnlǐ guānniàn hé xíngwéi guīfàn chǎnshēng le shēnyuǎn de yǐngxiǎng.
sentences.english: Confucian thought has had a profound influence on the ethical concepts and behavioral norms of East Asian societies.

sentences.hanzi: 当代艺术家在创作中往往融合传统元素与现代表现手法。
sentences.pinyin: dāngdài yìshùjiā zài chuàngzuò zhōng wǎngwǎng rónghé chuántǒng yuánsù yǔ xiàndài biǎoxiàn shǒufǎ.
sentences.english: Contemporary artists often blend traditional elements with modern methods of expression in their work.

sentences.hanzi: 方言的逐渐消亡引发了语言学界关于文化多样性保护的激烈争论。
sentences.pinyin: fāngyán de zhújiàn xiāowáng yǐnfā le yǔyánxué jiè guānyú wénhuà duōyàngxìng bǎohù de jīliè zhēnglùn.
sentences.english: The gradual disappearance of dialects has sparked fierce debate in linguistic circles about preserving cultural diversity.

sentences.hanzi: 丝绸之路不仅是贸易通道，更是东西方思想与艺术交融的文化走廊。
sentences.pinyin: sīchóu zhī lù bùjǐn shì màoyì tōngdào, gèng shì dōng xī fāng sīxiǎng yǔ yìshù jiāoróng de wénhuà zǒuláng.
sentences.english: The Silk Road was not only a trade route but also a cultural corridor where Eastern and Western thought and art blended.

sentences.hanzi: 口述历史项目的推广使边缘群体的文化记忆得以保存和传递。
sentences.pinyin: kǒushù lìshǐ xiàngmù de tuīguǎng shǐ biānyuán qúntǐ de wénhuà jìyì déyǐ bǎocún hé chuándì.
sentences.english: The promotion of oral history projects has enabled the cultural memories of marginalized groups to be preserved and passed on.

sentences.hanzi: 戏曲表演艺术中蕴含着丰富的身体语言符号和象征体系。
sentences.pinyin: xìqǔ biǎoyǎn yìshù zhōng yùnhán zhe fēngfù de shēntǐ yǔyán fúhào hé xiàngzhēng tǐxì.
sentences.english: Traditional opera performance art contains a rich system of body language symbols and symbolism.

sentences.hanzi: 文化认同的建构不仅依赖于历史记忆的延续，更取决于当代叙事的重塑。
sentences.pinyin: wénhuà rèntóng de jiàngòu bùjǐn yīlài yú lìshǐ jìyì de yánxù, gèng qǔjué yú dāngdài xùshì de chóngsù.
sentences.english: The construction of cultural identity relies not only on the continuation of historical memory but even more on the reshaping of contemporary narratives.

sentences.hanzi: 民间信仰与正统宗教之间的互动塑造了中国文化独特的精神面貌。
sentences.pinyin: mínjiān xìnyǎng yǔ zhèngtǒng zōngjiào zhījiān de hùdòng sùzào le zhōngguó wénhuà dútè de jīngshén miànmào.
sentences.english: The interaction between folk beliefs and orthodox religion has shaped the unique spiritual character of Chinese culture.

sentences.hanzi: 文学经典的重新诠释反映了不同时代读者的期待视野与价值取向。
sentences.pinyin: wénxué jīngdiǎn de chóngxīn quánshì fǎnyìng le bùtóng shídài dúzhě de qīdài shìyě yǔ jiàzhí qǔxiàng.
sentences.english: The reinterpretation of literary classics reflects the horizons of expectation and value orientations of readers across different eras.

sentences.hanzi: 饮食文化的地域差异深刻体现了自然环境与人文传统之间的长期互构。
sentences.pinyin: yǐnshí wénhuà de dìyù chāyì shēnkè tǐxiàn le zìrán huánjìng yǔ rénwén chuántǒng zhījiān de chángqī hùgòu.
sentences.english: Regional differences in food culture profoundly reflect the long-term mutual construction between natural environment and humanistic traditions.

sentences.hanzi: 非遗传承人制度的设立旨在为活态文化的代际延续提供制度性保障。
sentences.pinyin: fēi yí chuánchéngrén zhìdù de shèlì zhǐzài wèi huótài wénhuà de dàijì yánxù tígōng zhìdùxìng bǎozhàng.
sentences.english: The establishment of the intangible heritage inheritor system aims to provide institutional safeguards for the intergenerational continuation of living culture.

sentences.hanzi: 传统美学范畴中'意境'的营造强调主体感受与客观物象的浑然交融。
sentences.pinyin: chuántǒng měixué fànchóu zhōng 'yìjìng' de yíngzào qiángdiào zhǔtǐ gǎnshòu yǔ kèguān wùxiàng de húnrán jiāoróng.
sentences.english: The creation of 'artistic conception' in traditional aesthetics emphasizes the seamless fusion of subjective feeling and objective imagery.

sentences.hanzi: 文化软实力的输出不能简单等同于文化产品的商业化推广，还需兼顾深层价值理念的有效传递。
sentences.pinyin: wénhuà ruǎn shílì de shūchū bùnéng jiǎndān děngtóng yú wénhuà chǎnpǐn de shāngyèhuà tuīguǎng, hái xū jiāngù shēncéng jiàzhí lǐniàn de yǒuxiào chuándì.
sentences.english: The export of cultural soft power cannot simply be equated with the commercial promotion of cultural products; it must also account for the effective transmission of deep-level values.

sentences.hanzi: 后现代语境下的文化批评解构了传统审美范式中的等级秩序。
sentences.pinyin: hòu xiàndài yǔjìng xià de wénhuà pīpíng jiěgòu le chuántǒng shěnměi fànshì zhōng de děngjí zhìxù.
sentences.english: Cultural criticism in the postmodern context has deconstructed the hierarchical order within traditional aesthetic paradigms.

sentences.hanzi: 跨媒介叙事的兴起使得传统文化的传播路径发生了根本性变革。
sentences.pinyin: kuà méijiè xùshì de xīngqǐ shǐde chuántǒng wénhuà de chuánbō lùjìng fāshēng le gēnběnxìng biàngé.
sentences.english: The rise of transmedia storytelling has fundamentally transformed the dissemination pathways of traditional culture.

sentences.hanzi: 数字人文研究方法为古典文献的跨语言比较分析提供了全新的技术手段。
sentences.pinyin: shùzì rénwén yánjiū fāngfǎ wèi gǔdiǎn wénxiàn de kuà yǔyán bǐjiào fēnxī tígōng le quánxīn de jìshù shǒuduàn.
sentences.english: Digital humanities research methods have provided entirely new technical means for cross-linguistic comparative analysis of classical texts.

sentences.hanzi: 文化记忆理论揭示了集体叙事在维系共同体认同中的建构性功能。
sentences.pinyin: wénhuà jìyì lǐlùn jiēshì le jítǐ xùshì zài wéixì gòngtóngtǐ rèntóng zhōng de jiàngòuxìng gōngnéng.
sentences.english: Cultural memory theory reveals the constructive function of collective narrative in sustaining community identity.

sentences.hanzi: 人工智能生成艺术对'创作主体性'这一美学核心概念构成了根本性挑战。
sentences.pinyin: réngōng zhìnéng shēngchéng yìshù duì 'chuàngzuò zhǔtǐxìng' zhè yī měixué héxīn gàiniàn gòuchéng le gēnběnxìng tiǎozhàn.
sentences.english: AI-generated art poses a fundamental challenge to the core aesthetic concept of 'creative subjectivity.'

sentences.hanzi: 文化传承的悖论在于：过度博物馆化会使活态文化沦为僵化的符号，而放任自流则可能导致其在商业浪潮中丧失本真。
sentences.pinyin: wénhuà chuánchéng de bèilùn zàiyú: guòdù bówùguǎnhuà huì shǐ huótài wénhuà lúnwéi jiānghuà de fúhào, ér fàngrèn zìliú zé kěnéng dǎozhì qí zài shāngyè làngcháo zhōng sàngshī běnzhēn.
sentences.english: The paradox of cultural transmission is that excessive museumification turns living culture into rigid symbols, while laissez-faire may cause it to lose its authenticity in commercial tides.

sentences.hanzi: 审美经验的跨文化转译始终面临着不可通约性的根本困境。
sentences.pinyin: shěnměi jīngyàn de kuà wénhuà zhuǎnyì shǐzhōng miànlín zhe bùkě tōngyuēxìng de gēnběn kùnjìng.
sentences.english: The cross-cultural translation of aesthetic experience perpetually faces the fundamental dilemma of incommensurability.

sentences.hanzi: 在全球文化趋同的压力下，地方性知识体系的存续价值亟需从认识论层面予以重新审视。
sentences.pinyin: zài quánqiú wénhuà qūtóng de yālì xià, dìfāngxìng zhīshi tǐxì de cúnxù jiàzhí jíxū cóng rènshilùn céngmiàn yǔyǐ chóngxīn shěnshì.
sentences.english: Under the pressure of global cultural convergence, the value of preserving local knowledge systems urgently needs to be re-examined from an epistemological perspective.

sentences.hanzi: 经典文本的阐释循环揭示了理解活动中'前见'与'视域融合'之间不可消除的诠释学张力。
sentences.pinyin: jīngdiǎn wénběn de chǎnshì xúnhuán jiēshì le lǐjiě huódòng zhōng 'qiánjiàn' yǔ 'shìyù rónghé' zhījiān bùkě xiāochú de quánshìxué zhānglì.
sentences.english: The hermeneutic circle of classical texts reveals the ineliminable interpretive tension between 'prejudice' and 'fusion of horizons' in the act of understanding.

sentences.hanzi: 文化相对主义与普世价值之间的根本分歧，折射出人类自我理解中多元性与统一性的永恒悖论。
sentences.pinyin: wénhuà xiāngduì zhǔyì yǔ pǔshì jiàzhí zhījiān de gēnběn fēnqí, zhéshè chū rénlèi zìwǒ lǐjiě zhōng duōyuánxìng yǔ tǒngyīxìng de yǒnghéng bèilùn.
sentences.english: The fundamental divergence between cultural relativism and universal values reflects the eternal paradox of plurality and unity in humanity's self-understanding.

sentences.hanzi: 仪式实践的身体性维度揭示了文化传承中不可还原为话语的默会知识层面。
sentences.pinyin: yíshì shíjiàn de shēntǐxìng wéidù jiēshì le wénhuà chuánchéng zhōng bùkě huányuán wéi huàyǔ de mòhuì zhīshi céngmiàn.
sentences.english: The bodily dimension of ritual practice reveals the level of tacit knowledge in cultural transmission that cannot be reduced to discourse.
